hero_subtitle: SFTY supports regulated digital asset businesses by documenting user permissions, maintaining audit logs, and streamlining access reviews for institutional compliance and governance.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Access control gaps complicate compliance governance
problem_description: Without clear role-based access and audit logs, compliance teams struggle to verify who accessed sensitive systems and when. This weakens auditability, delays access reviews, and increases risks during bank due diligence and regulatory inspections.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects user permissions, access logs and audit evidence into one workflow so compliance teams can verify access events, review roles efficiently and maintain a clear governance trail.
workflow_title: From access policy to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY connects role-based access controls with user permissions, review workflows, audit logs and evidence preservation to support institutional governance and compliance.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another workflow tool. Evidence-ready access control
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides a provider-neutral layer that structures role-based access reviews into auditable cases, preserving evidence and supporting clear compliance governance for institutional teams.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports regulated VASPs with controlled user permissions, audit-ready evidence and secure deployment to meet governance and bank due diligence standards.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for regulated digital asset businesses?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer connecting provider outputs into structured workflows, supporting regulated digital asset firms with onboarding, monitoring, rule updates, case management and audit evidence preservation.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage access review workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies role-based permissions and controlled access workflows enabling compliance teams to review, approve or revoke user access with audit logs to support internal governance and regulatory requirements.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case histories and provider results in evidence-grade records, supporting traceability and supporting audit readiness without altering underlying data from integrated providers.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY is provider-neutral and designed to connect KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, screening and other compliance tools into a connected operational compliance workflow layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but structures their outputs into auditable workflows, enabling regulated businesses to maintain existing vendor relationships while enhancing compliance control and visibility.
final_title: Structure role-based access reviews with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY supports audit logs, user permissions and controlled workflows for enterprise compliance governance.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
